member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.OdeseBinConverter.IOdeseBinConverterExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending Odese Converter Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.OdeseBinConverter.IOdeseBinConverterExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.OdeseBinConverter.IOdeseBinConverterExtensions.ConvertSoftBin(Prime.TestMethods.OdeseBinConverter.OdeseTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Provides the user the ability to post process exit port, and implement their logic for Softbin Calculation.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, and 8-digit softbin.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.OdeseBinConverter.OdeseTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.OdeseBinConverter.PrimeOdeseBinConverterTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Odese 8 digits Softbin conversion to 4 digits.
